headline: FCG: Structural Improvements Deliver Cash Flow, Not Just High Oil Prices

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on EOG Resources, Raises Price Target to $199
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Hanwen Chang   maintains EOG Resources (NYSE:EOG) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $155 to $199.

headline: Energy Stocks Just Had Their Worst Day In A Year — 20 Stocks Hit By Trump's Ceasefire
summary: XLE falls 4.7% and XOP drops 6.3%—worst sessions since April 2025—as WTI crashes 18% on Trump's Iran ceasefire. APA leads XLE losses at −13.3%.

raw.headline: Energy Stocks Just Had Their Worst Day In A Year — 20 Stocks Hit By Trump's Ceasefire
raw.summary: XLE falls 4.7% and XOP drops 6.3%—worst sessions since April 2025—as WTI crashes 18% on Trump's Iran ceasefire. APA leads XLE losses at −13.3%.

headline: Shares of oil and gas companies are trading lower after President Trump posted on social media that the U.S. will work closely with Iran and that many of the 15 points in the proposed plan to end the war have been agreed to, signaling a de-escalation in the Middle East conflict and related supply chain constraints.
